title: June 26
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|June|hide31=yes}}

'''June 26''' is the 177th day of the year (178th in leap years), with 188 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1943|1943]] – [[John Beasley]] is born.
*[[1950s#1950|1950]] – [[Tom DeFalco]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Núria Peris]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 27|''Star Wars'' (1977) 27]] published.
*[[1987]] – [[Zoraida Córdova]] is born.
*[[1997]] – Filming for [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''The Phantom Menace'']] starts.
*[[2000]] – Filming for [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Attack of the Clones'']] starts.
*[[2002]] – ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 26]]'' published.
*[[2003]] – ''[[Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided]]'' released on the PC platform.
*[[2006]] – ''[[Rookies: No Turning Back]]'' [[Webstrips|webstrip]] begins.
*[[2007]] – ''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'' paperback released.
*[[2012]] – ''[[Choices of One]]'' paperback released.
*[[2019]] – [[Naboo]] added to Capital Supremacy in [[Star Wars Battlefront II]].
*2019 – [[Galaxy's Edge 3|''Galaxy's Edge'' 3]] published.
*2019 – [[Age of Rebellion - Darth Vader 1|''Age of Rebellion - Darth Vader'' 1]] published.
*[[2024]] – [[Darth Maul – Black, White & Red 3|''Darth Maul – Black, White & Red'' 3]] published.
*2024 – [[The High Republic Adventures – Saber for Hire 3|''The High Republic Adventures – Saber for Hire'' 3]] published.
